title: Migrate the content editor chrome to shadcn/ui
description: Migrate the editor's surrounding chrome — `EditorToolbar`, `ComponentEmbedPicker`, `ControlsPanel`, the publish/history header in `PageContentPage`, and the Dos/Don'ts cover controls from Fase 8 (TASK-72/73) — to Tailwind + shadcn/ui. The Tiptap document content itself (`editor.css`, the prose styling of headings/paragraphs/tables/callouts/dos-donts) is explicitly OUT of scope: only the chrome around the editable area changes.
acceptanceCriteria: `EditorToolbar` buttons (headings, bold/italic, lists, code block, table controls, callout variant picker, component-embed insert, dos-donts insert) are rebuilt with shadcn `Button`/`ToggleGroup`/`Popover` as appropriate and lucide-react icons, preserving the active-state highlighting (`useEditorState`) and the `onMouseDown={preventDefault}` selection-preservation behavior

`ComponentEmbedPicker`'s two-step flow (component list → variant list) is rebuilt with shadcn `Command`/`Popover` or `Dialog` (a searchable list pattern), preserving the `initial` pre-selection behavior for re-selecting over an existing embed
`ControlsPanel` (text/boolean/select controls driving `postMessage` to the preview iframe) is rebuilt with shadcn `Input`/`Switch`/`Select`
`PageContentPage`'s header (title, Histórico link, Publicar button, tab bar) is rebuilt with shadcn `Button`/`Tabs`
The Tiptap content area itself (headings, paragraphs, tables, callouts, dos-donts blocks) is visually unchanged — `editor.css` is not touched by this task
No change to any Tiptap command, tRPC call, or the postMessage contract; verified in the browser across all block types including the Fase 8 dos-donts insertion/cover controls

steps.details: Rebuild button groups with shadcn `Button`/`ToggleGroup`, lucide-react icons for each command, and a `Popover`/small menu for the callout-variant and dos-donts-variant pickers, preserving the caret-preservation `onMouseDown` handling.
Rebuild the two-step component/variant picker and the props controls panel with shadcn primitives, preserving all existing query/mutation wiring.
Rebuild the page header and the body/tabs navigation (from TASK-67) with shadcn `Tabs`/`Button`, preserving the flush-before-publish behavior and the toast conversion from TASK-76.

Exercise every toolbar command, insert every block type including a dos-donts with both cover kinds (TASK-72/73), confirm the prose content area is visually unchanged, confirm autosave/publish still work.

technicalNotes: Depends on TASK-74 (Fase 8 fully landed) so the dos-donts toolbar/cover controls exist before being restyled here, rather than restyling twice.

Explicitly do not touch `editor.css` / the ProseMirror content styling — Tailwind's preflight reset must not leak into the editable prose area (verify headings/lists/tables/callouts render identically before and after).
